transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Riverbend Health Navigator. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Alvarez. It's currently on the 14th.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure thing. I see Dr. Alvarez here, specialty is podiatry, and the next opening is next Tuesday at 9 AM.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Wait, podiatry? Dr. Alvarez is my cardiologist.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me double check that... you're right, I pulled up the wrong provider. Dr. Alvarez, cardiology, has an opening Tuesday at 2 PM instead.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, 2 PM Tuesday works better anyway.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I'll move your appointment to Tuesday the 21st at 2 PM with Dr. Alvarez, cardiology.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Anything else I can help with today?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, have a good day.
